prompt plan read.body: Read the plan at the following path and enter plan mode and ask me any questions before starting:

prompt plan write.body: Write a plan for this, make it detailed enough that it can be re-opened from another session without losing context

prompt review git commit.body: Code review the current commit (check the current commit with `git rev-parse HEAD` [don't switch commits if this isn't what you expect]).

prompt review Mercurial commit.body: Code review the current commit (check the current commit with `sl log -l 1` [don't switch commits if this isn't what you expect]).

prompt review dir.body: Review the current directory and give feedback on how it can be improved.

prompt fix on commit.body: Fix on the commit that introduced it

prompt fix compile on commit.body: These commits are not compiling. Fix all the errors on the commits that introduced them, and keep doing that until there's no more compile errors.
